description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a predominantly white body accented by bold orange panels and circular motifs on one side. The front panel is visually divided, with three orange circles aligned vertically, suggesting interactive or decorative elements. The top of the kiosk has a slightly raised, rounded section, possibly for signage or branding, and a small logo is visible on the upper right corner. The base is solid and orange, providing stability and a visual anchor. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a minimalistic color palette. The kiosk appears to be constructed from metal or composite panels, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a white body, orange accents, and circular motifs, featuring a raised top section and a solid orange base.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the slim profile of the kiosk, with the orange base and white upper section visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the white panel with three orange circles, an orange side strip, and a small logo at the top right.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlights the orange base and the slim, rectangular form.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a mostly white panel with an orange side, lacking the circular motifs and logo seen on the front.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign with logo, placed on the upper right corner of the front panel
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with a raised, rounded signage section on top; smooth and minimalistic
